dimensions.name: correctness
dimensions.evidence: Core wave-1 integration tests passed, but the XDG-state AC is not fully met: `bin/frw.d/install.sh` still appends consumer install-artifact entries directly to the project `.gitignore` (`bin/frw.d/install.sh:790-803`) instead of keeping those consumer-only artifacts under `$XDG_STATE_HOME/furrow/{repo-slug}/`.

dimensions.name: test-coverage
dimensions.evidence: All major new branchy surfaces in wave 1 have dedicated integration coverage: install mode/source-copy/XDG/idempotency (`test-install-*`), rescue (`test-rescue.sh`), hook split/blocking (`test-hook-cascade.sh`, `test-precommit-*`), sort invariants (`test-sort-*`), legacy migration (`test-legacy-migration.sh`), and CI contamination (`test-ci-contamination.sh`).

dimensions.name: spec-compliance
dimensions.evidence: The deliverable diverges from the stated XDG layout contract by mutating repo-local `.gitignore` for consumer installs (`bin/frw.d/install.sh:790-803`), which conflicts with the acceptance criterion that consumer-only install artifacts live under XDG state.

dimensions.name: unplanned-changes
dimensions.evidence: Wave-1 commits touched many files outside the declared `file_ownership` globs, including `bin/frw`, `bin/alm`, `bin/sds`, `.gitignore`, 12 non-precommit hooks, normalize scripts, and several integration tests (`git diff --name-only 31d3401^..5ef805a`), so the ownership contract is incomplete.

dimensions.name: code-quality
dimensions.evidence: `shellcheck` on the deliverable shell surfaces exits 1 with errors, including SC2148 on multiple touched hook scripts lacking a shebang (`bin/frw.d/hooks/correction-limit.sh`, `gate-check.sh`, `ownership-warn.sh`, `post-compact.sh`, `script-guard.sh`, `state-guard.sh`, `stop-ideation.sh`, `validate-definition.sh`, `validate-summary.sh`, `verdict-guard.sh`, `work-check.sh`).
